records.m_Talk_ENG: If you're an Administration Senior... then what about Minha here?
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you're an Administration Senior... then what about Minha here?
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you're an Administration Senior... then what about Minha here?

records.m_Talk_ENG: She's Ground One's Official Counter.
records.m_Talk_DEU: She's Ground One's Official Counter.
records.m_Talk_FRA: She's Ground One's Official Counter.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I had no idea someone so young could be an Official Counter...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I had no idea someone so young could be an Official Counter...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I had no idea someone so young could be an Official Counter...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Residents aren't obligated to know the identity of their Official Counter.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Residents aren't obligated to know the identity of their Official Counter.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Residents aren't obligated to know the identity of their Official Counter.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even so, it's true that Minha has barely shown her face in Ground One. Negligence. Dereliction of duty.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even so, it's true that Minha has barely shown her face in Ground One. Negligence. Dereliction of duty.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even so, it's true that Minha has barely shown her face in Ground One. Negligence. Dereliction of duty.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's not like I ever asked to inherit the position. The Senior dumped it on me on his own.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's not like I ever asked to inherit the position. The Senior dumped it on me on his own.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's not like I ever asked to inherit the position. The Senior dumped it on me on his own.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I was busy traveling the world, saving people.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I was busy traveling the world, saving people.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I was busy traveling the world, saving people.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Saving people?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Saving people?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Saving people?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Minha has a tendency to feel exhilarated when she rescues people and receives their gratitude.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Minha has a tendency to feel exhilarated when she rescues people and receives their gratitude.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Minha has a tendency to feel exhilarated when she rescues people and receives their gratitude.

records.m_Talk_ENG: She probably got excited and went on about being your life-saver when she helped you, too. A sort of messiah complex.
records.m_Talk_DEU: She probably got excited and went on about being your life-saver when she helped you, too. A sort of messiah complex.
records.m_Talk_FRA: She probably got excited and went on about being your life-saver when she helped you, too. A sort of messiah complex.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, Ms. Maalouf. When you put it like that, I sound crazy.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, Ms. Maalouf. When you put it like that, I sound crazy.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, Ms. Maalouf. When you put it like that, I sound crazy.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If that's not it, then why abandon your role as Official Counter and wander all over the place?
records.m_Talk_DEU: If that's not it, then why abandon your role as Official Counter and wander all over the place?
records.m_Talk_FRA: If that's not it, then why abandon your role as Official Counter and wander all over the place?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's...
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's...
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Tch, whatever. Think what you want.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Tch, whatever. Think what you want.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Tch, whatever. Think what you want.

records.m_Talk_ENG: As I said earlier, we're tracking intruders who slipped into Ground One.
records.m_Talk_DEU: As I said earlier, we're tracking intruders who slipped into Ground One.
records.m_Talk_FRA: As I said earlier, we're tracking intruders who slipped into Ground One.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That investigation led us to the bar where you work, and to what they're after.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That investigation led us to the bar where you work, and to what they're after.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That investigation led us to the bar where you work, and to what they're after.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You mean Momo...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You mean Momo...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You mean Momo...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'd appreciate it if you told us everything you know about that child.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'd appreciate it if you told us everything you know about that child.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'd appreciate it if you told us everything you know about that child.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Momo...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Momo...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Momo...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Loves sweets, and a walking disaster who has unbelievably bad luck, causing trouble wherever she goes.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Loves sweets, and a walking disaster who has unbelievably bad luck, causing trouble wherever she goes.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Loves sweets, and a walking disaster who has unbelievably bad luck, causing trouble wherever she goes.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's all I really know.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's all I really know.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's all I really know.

records.m_Talk_ENG: When the intruders called her a devil, you clearly reacted, didn't you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: When the intruders called her a devil, you clearly reacted, didn't you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: When the intruders called her a devil, you clearly reacted, didn't you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: If there's something you're hiding, why not come clean before it's too late?
records.m_Talk_DEU: If there's something you're hiding, why not come clean before it's too late?
records.m_Talk_FRA: If there's something you're hiding, why not come clean before it's too late?

records.m_Talk_ENG: When I first met Momo... I thought she was a devil too.
records.m_Talk_DEU: When I first met Momo... I thought she was a devil too.
records.m_Talk_FRA: When I first met Momo... I thought she was a devil too.

records.m_Talk_ENG: She had real horns, not decorations, and the devil-detecting pendulum only reacted inside that bar.
records.m_Talk_DEU: She had real horns, not decorations, and the devil-detecting pendulum only reacted inside that bar.
records.m_Talk_FRA: She had real horns, not decorations, and the devil-detecting pendulum only reacted inside that bar.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But now... I'm not sure anymore.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But now... I'm not sure anymore.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But now... I'm not sure anymore.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Whether she's truly a devil, and even if she is, whether she's a devil so evil that she deserves to be eliminated.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Whether she's truly a devil, and even if she is, whether she's a devil so evil that she deserves to be eliminated.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Whether she's truly a devil, and even if she is, whether she's a devil so evil that she deserves to be eliminated.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Not knowing whether devils are evil... Hardly something I'd expect to hear from an exorcist.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Not knowing whether devils are evil... Hardly something I'd expect to hear from an exorcist.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Not knowing whether devils are evil... Hardly something I'd expect to hear from an exorcist.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If Momo really is a devil... what would the Administration do?
records.m_Talk_DEU: If Momo really is a devil... what would the Administration do?
records.m_Talk_FRA: If Momo really is a devil... what would the Administration do?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Administration doesn't judge enemies based on whether they're devils, but on whether they pose a threat to the city.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Administration doesn't judge enemies based on whether they're devils, but on whether they pose a threat to the city.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Administration doesn't judge enemies based on whether they're devils, but on whether they pose a threat to the city.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Whether it's an ordinary civilian, a criminal Counter, or a devil, if they cause trouble in my jurisdiction, we respond according to Administration regulations.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Whether it's an ordinary civilian, a criminal Counter, or a devil, if they cause trouble in my jurisdiction, we respond according to Administration regulations.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Whether it's an ordinary civilian, a criminal Counter, or a devil, if they cause trouble in my jurisdiction, we respond according to Administration regulations.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I don't know how dangerous the kind of devil you're talking about is, but the intruders have already hurt people in Ground One.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I don't know how dangerous the kind of devil you're talking about is, but the intruders have already hurt people in Ground One.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I don't know how dangerous the kind of devil you're talking about is, but the intruders have already hurt people in Ground One.

records.m_Talk_ENG: On top of that, we've detected signs they were securing internal city maps and trying to disable security systems.
records.m_Talk_DEU: On top of that, we've detected signs they were securing internal city maps and trying to disable security systems.
records.m_Talk_FRA: On top of that, we've detected signs they were securing internal city maps and trying to disable security systems.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's the kind of threat we're trying to stop.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's the kind of threat we're trying to stop.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's the kind of threat we're trying to stop.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you want to be involved in this matter, you'll follow the Administration's instructions from here on out.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you want to be involved in this matter, you'll follow the Administration's instructions from here on out.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you want to be involved in this matter, you'll follow the Administration's instructions from here on out.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Any personal actions that interfere with our work will be treated as violations. Be careful.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Any personal actions that interfere with our work will be treated as violations. Be careful.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Any personal actions that interfere with our work will be treated as violations. Be careful.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you need help, I want to help.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you need help, I want to help.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you need help, I want to help.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But there's something even more important to me than that...
records.m_Talk_DEU: But there's something even more important to me than that...
records.m_Talk_FRA: But there's something even more important to me than that...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't worry. While you're cooperating, we'll ensure the safety of Momo.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't worry. While you're cooperating, we'll ensure the safety of Momo.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't worry. While you're cooperating, we'll ensure the safety of Momo.

records.m_Talk_ENG: She'll be in a far safer place than an exposed bar like that.
records.m_Talk_DEU: She'll be in a far safer place than an exposed bar like that.
records.m_Talk_FRA: She'll be in a far safer place than an exposed bar like that.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ooh... So this is my new hideout!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ooh... So this is my new hideout!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ooh... So this is my new hideout!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Momo, will you be all right on your own for a while?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Momo, will you be all right on your own for a while?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Momo, will you be all right on your own for a while?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What do you take a Demon Lord for? I'll be fine! Go on already, Nicole!
records.m_Talk_DEU: What do you take a Demon Lord for? I'll be fine! Go on already, Nicole!
records.m_Talk_FRA: What do you take a Demon Lord for? I'll be fine! Go on already, Nicole!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ah... Sure.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ah... Sure.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ah... Sure.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What, feeling a little disappointed now that the kid isn't clinging to you and begging you not to go?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What, feeling a little disappointed now that the kid isn't clinging to you and begging you not to go?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What, feeling a little disappointed now that the kid isn't clinging to you and begging you not to go?

records.m_Talk_ENG: N-no, that's not it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: N-no, that's not it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: N-no, that's not it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I thought she'd hate staying in an unfamiliar place, so it's a surprise she likes it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I thought she'd hate staying in an unfamiliar place, so it's a surprise she likes it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I thought she'd hate staying in an unfamiliar place, so it's a surprise she likes it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's because I prepared a special lure.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's because I prepared a special lure.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's because I prepared a special lure.

records.m_Talk_ENG: No kid is going to say they want to go home when there's a five-tier dessert cart piled high with snacks right in front of them.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No kid is going to say they want to go home when there's a five-tier dessert cart piled high with snacks right in front of them.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No kid is going to say they want to go home when there's a five-tier dessert cart piled high with snacks right in front of them.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Blegh! Ginseng jelly is gross!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Blegh! Ginseng jelly is gross!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Blegh! Ginseng jelly is gross!

records.m_Talk_ENG: What?! But that's the best one...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: What?! But that's the best one...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: What?! But that's the best one...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ahem, anyway. It's not like you're vanishing without warning. If you stuff her with good food and sleep here a few nights, and come to get her after, why would she refuse?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ahem, anyway. It's not like you're vanishing without warning. If you stuff her with good food and sleep here a few nights, and come to get her after, why would she refuse?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ahem, anyway. It's not like you're vanishing without warning. If you stuff her with good food and sleep here a few nights, and come to get her after, why would she refuse?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...You're right. I guess I was worrying over nothing.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...You're right. I guess I was worrying over nothing.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...You're right. I guess I was worrying over nothing.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Let's go, Minha.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Let's go, Minha.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Let's go, Minha.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mm?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mm?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mm?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Nicole.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Nicole.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Nicole.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Momo?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Momo?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Momo?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Whatever you're doing, come back safely.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Whatever you're doing, come back safely.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Whatever you're doing, come back safely.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll wait bravely too.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll wait bravely too.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll wait bravely too.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It was a strange feeling.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It was a strange feeling.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It was a strange feeling.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I always thought of her as a helpless kid I had to protect.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I always thought of her as a helpless kid I had to protect.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I always thought of her as a helpless kid I had to protect.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But she can make such a reassuring expression, too...
records.m_Talk_DEU: But she can make such a reassuring expression, too...
records.m_Talk_FRA: But she can make such a reassuring expression, too...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So wait without worry, Demon Lord.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So wait without worry, Demon Lord.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So wait without worry, Demon Lord.

records.m_Talk_ENG: By the way, that kid...
records.m_Talk_DEU: By the way, that kid...
records.m_Talk_FRA: By the way, that kid...

records.m_Talk_ENG: She called herself a Demon Lord, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: She called herself a Demon Lord, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: She called herself a Demon Lord, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm one of that Demon Lord's four champions. It's like role-playing.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm one of that Demon Lord's four champions. It's like role-playing.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm one of that Demon Lord's four champions. It's like role-playing.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Do you know where she came from?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Do you know where she came from?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Do you know where she came from?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Our boss, who's away on a trip right now, brought her.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Our boss, who's away on a trip right now, brought her.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Our boss, who's away on a trip right now, brought her.

records.m_Talk_ENG: From where?
records.m_Talk_DEU: From where?
records.m_Talk_FRA: From where?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm not sure. I never asked that far.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm not sure. I never asked that far.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm not sure. I never asked that far.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Senior told me to cooperate, but I don't really like working with others.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Senior told me to cooperate, but I don't really like working with others.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Senior told me to cooperate, but I don't really like working with others.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So you can just go back to the bar.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So you can just go back to the bar.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So you can just go back to the bar.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
What? Did I say something wrong? Why all of a sudden
8g
records.m_Talk_DEU:
What? Did I say something wrong? Why all of a sudden
8g
records.m_Talk_FRA:
What? Did I say something wrong? Why all of a sudden
8g

records.m_Talk_ENG: This isn't a case an ordinary person can handle.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This isn't a case an ordinary person can handle.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This isn't a case an ordinary person can handle.

records.m_Talk_ENG: No matter who the Senior is, they can't just casually drag an unrelated civilian into something that risks their life.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No matter who the Senior is, they can't just casually drag an unrelated civilian into something that risks their life.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No matter who the Senior is, they can't just casually drag an unrelated civilian into something that risks their life.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This isn't someone else's problem. Momo was targeted by those intruders!
records.m_Talk_DEU: This isn't someone else's problem. Momo was targeted by those intruders!
records.m_Talk_FRA: This isn't someone else's problem. Momo was targeted by those intruders!

records.m_Talk_ENG: That means I have a responsibility to uncover the truth, too.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That means I have a responsibility to uncover the truth, too.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That means I have a responsibility to uncover the truth, too.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That kid likes you. She follows you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That kid likes you. She follows you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That kid likes you. She follows you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I don't want to be the one to tell her the person she cares about is dead.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I don't want to be the one to tell her the person she cares about is dead.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I don't want to be the one to tell her the person she cares about is dead.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why... would you say something so ominous?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why... would you say something so ominous?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why... would you say something so ominous?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The intruders in Ground One are far more dangerous than you imagine.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The intruders in Ground One are far more dangerous than you imagine.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The intruders in Ground One are far more dangerous than you imagine.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Two years ago, everyone who tried to dig into what was behind them died. That included a Grade S Counter.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Two years ago, everyone who tried to dig into what was behind them died. That included a Grade S Counter.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Two years ago, everyone who tried to dig into what was behind them died. That included a Grade S Counter.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A Grade S Counter was taken out?
records.m_Talk_DEU: A Grade S Counter was taken out?
records.m_Talk_FRA: A Grade S Counter was taken out?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then the one behind it all... That Demon Lord you mentioned before?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then the one behind it all... That Demon Lord you mentioned before?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then the one behind it all... That Demon Lord you mentioned before?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's right. The Demon Lord Beelzebub.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's right. The Demon Lord Beelzebub.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's right. The Demon Lord Beelzebub.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A monster that could wipe out not just a Grade S Counter, but an entire world. And his followers, people who worship something like that as a god, set foot in Ground One with their own schemes.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A monster that could wipe out not just a Grade S Counter, but an entire world. And his followers, people who worship something like that as a god, set foot in Ground One with their own schemes.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A monster that could wipe out not just a Grade S Counter, but an entire world. And his followers, people who worship something like that as a god, set foot in Ground One with their own schemes.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So step away.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So step away.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So step away.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Leave it to the Administration from here on out, hide quietly, and return to your normal life.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Leave it to the Administration from here on out, hide quietly, and return to your normal life.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Leave it to the Administration from here on out, hide quietly, and return to your normal life.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If even a Grade S Counter fell, then you're risking your life too, aren't you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: If even a Grade S Counter fell, then you're risking your life too, aren't you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: If even a Grade S Counter fell, then you're risking your life too, aren't you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm prepared for that. That's where you and I differ.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm prepared for that. That's where you and I differ.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm prepared for that. That's where you and I differ.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Can you say you'd be fine with dying, leaving that kid behind?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Can you say you'd be fine with dying, leaving that kid behind?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Can you say you'd be fine with dying, leaving that kid behind?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: This is an emergency broadcast on the priority channel.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This is an emergency broadcast on the priority channel.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This is an emergency broadcast on the priority channel.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Approximately three minutes ago, the Police Agency received eight reports of hostiles. All eight locations are showing Corruption ray readings.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Approximately three minutes ago, the Police Agency received eight reports of hostiles. All eight locations are showing Corruption ray readings.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Approximately three minutes ago, the Police Agency received eight reports of hostiles. All eight locations are showing Corruption ray readings.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Rapid response units are en route to the initial observation points. To minimize damage to the city, all available Administration forces capable of reaching the transmitted coordinates are requested to provide immediate support.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Rapid response units are en route to the initial observation points. To minimize damage to the city, all available Administration forces capable of reaching the transmitted coordinates are requested to provide immediate support.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Rapid response units are en route to the initial observation points. To minimize damage to the city, all available Administration forces capable of reaching the transmitted coordinates are requested to provide immediate support.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I repeat...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I repeat...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I repeat...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Everyone has their own reason to live.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Everyone has their own reason to live.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Everyone has their own reason to live.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Digging into those Demon Lord cultists, finding and smacking the Demon Lord down... is my reason.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Digging into those Demon Lord cultists, finding and smacking the Demon Lord down... is my reason.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Digging into those Demon Lord cultists, finding and smacking the Demon Lord down... is my reason.

records.m_Talk_ENG: My reason for living.
records.m_Talk_DEU: My reason for living.
records.m_Talk_FRA: My reason for living.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is this girl... alive?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Is this girl... alive?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Is this girl... alive?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. When we arrived, she was the village's sole survivor.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. When we arrived, she was the village's sole survivor.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. When we arrived, she was the village's sole survivor.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Unbelievable. After that many C.O.s swept through the area... someone made it out alive?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Unbelievable. After that many C.O.s swept through the area... someone made it out alive?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Unbelievable. After that many C.O.s swept through the area... someone made it out alive?

records.m_Talk_ENG: As you say, it can only be called a miracle.
records.m_Talk_DEU: As you say, it can only be called a miracle.
records.m_Talk_FRA: As you say, it can only be called a miracle.

records.m_Talk_ENG: There must be a reason the child survived...
records.m_Talk_DEU: There must be a reason the child survived...
records.m_Talk_FRA: There must be a reason the child survived...

records.m_Talk_ENG: And uncovering that reason will be the mission the Holy Curia bears.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And uncovering that reason will be the mission the Holy Curia bears.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And uncovering that reason will be the mission the Holy Curia bears.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If you're an Administration Senior... then what about Minha here?
root.m_Talk_DEU: If you're an Administration Senior... then what about Minha here?
root.m_Talk_FRA: If you're an Administration Senior... then what about Minha here?

root.m_Talk_ENG: She's Ground One's Official Counter.
root.m_Talk_DEU: She's Ground One's Official Counter.
root.m_Talk_FRA: She's Ground One's Official Counter.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I had no idea someone so young could be an Official Counter...
root.m_Talk_DEU: I had no idea someone so young could be an Official Counter...
root.m_Talk_FRA: I had no idea someone so young could be an Official Counter...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Residents aren't obligated to know the identity of their Official Counter.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Residents aren't obligated to know the identity of their Official Counter.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Residents aren't obligated to know the identity of their Official Counter.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Even so, it's true that Minha has barely shown her face in Ground One. Negligence. Dereliction of duty.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Even so, it's true that Minha has barely shown her face in Ground One. Negligence. Dereliction of duty.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Even so, it's true that Minha has barely shown her face in Ground One. Negligence. Dereliction of duty.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's not like I ever asked to inherit the position. The Senior dumped it on me on his own.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's not like I ever asked to inherit the position. The Senior dumped it on me on his own.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's not like I ever asked to inherit the position. The Senior dumped it on me on his own.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I was busy traveling the world, saving people.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I was busy traveling the world, saving people.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I was busy traveling the world, saving people.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Saving people?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Saving people?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Saving people?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Minha has a tendency to feel exhilarated when she rescues people and receives their gratitude.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Minha has a tendency to feel exhilarated when she rescues people and receives their gratitude.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Minha has a tendency to feel exhilarated when she rescues people and receives their gratitude.

root.m_Talk_ENG: She probably got excited and went on about being your life-saver when she helped you, too. A sort of messiah complex.
root.m_Talk_DEU: She probably got excited and went on about being your life-saver when she helped you, too. A sort of messiah complex.
root.m_Talk_FRA: She probably got excited and went on about being your life-saver when she helped you, too. A sort of messiah complex.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, Ms. Maalouf. When you put it like that, I sound crazy.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, Ms. Maalouf. When you put it like that, I sound crazy.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, Ms. Maalouf. When you put it like that, I sound crazy.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If that's not it, then why abandon your role as Official Counter and wander all over the place?
root.m_Talk_DEU: If that's not it, then why abandon your role as Official Counter and wander all over the place?
root.m_Talk_FRA: If that's not it, then why abandon your role as Official Counter and wander all over the place?

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's...
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's...
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Tch, whatever. Think what you want.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Tch, whatever. Think what you want.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Tch, whatever. Think what you want.

root.m_Talk_ENG: As I said earlier, we're tracking intruders who slipped into Ground One.
root.m_Talk_DEU: As I said earlier, we're tracking intruders who slipped into Ground One.
root.m_Talk_FRA: As I said earlier, we're tracking intruders who slipped into Ground One.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That investigation led us to the bar where you work, and to what they're after.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That investigation led us to the bar where you work, and to what they're after.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That investigation led us to the bar where you work, and to what they're after.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You mean Momo...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You mean Momo...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You mean Momo...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'd appreciate it if you told us everything you know about that child.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'd appreciate it if you told us everything you know about that child.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'd appreciate it if you told us everything you know about that child.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Momo...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Momo...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Momo...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Loves sweets, and a walking disaster who has unbelievably bad luck, causing trouble wherever she goes.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Loves sweets, and a walking disaster who has unbelievably bad luck, causing trouble wherever she goes.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Loves sweets, and a walking disaster who has unbelievably bad luck, causing trouble wherever she goes.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's all I really know.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's all I really know.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's all I really know.

root.m_Talk_ENG: When the intruders called her a devil, you clearly reacted, didn't you?
root.m_Talk_DEU: When the intruders called her a devil, you clearly reacted, didn't you?
root.m_Talk_FRA: When the intruders called her a devil, you clearly reacted, didn't you?

root.m_Talk_ENG: If there's something you're hiding, why not come clean before it's too late?
root.m_Talk_DEU: If there's something you're hiding, why not come clean before it's too late?
root.m_Talk_FRA: If there's something you're hiding, why not come clean before it's too late?

root.m_Talk_ENG: When I first met Momo... I thought she was a devil too.
root.m_Talk_DEU: When I first met Momo... I thought she was a devil too.
root.m_Talk_FRA: When I first met Momo... I thought she was a devil too.

root.m_Talk_ENG: She had real horns, not decorations, and the devil-detecting pendulum only reacted inside that bar.
root.m_Talk_DEU: She had real horns, not decorations, and the devil-detecting pendulum only reacted inside that bar.
root.m_Talk_FRA: She had real horns, not decorations, and the devil-detecting pendulum only reacted inside that bar.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But now... I'm not sure anymore.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But now... I'm not sure anymore.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But now... I'm not sure anymore.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Whether she's truly a devil, and even if she is, whether she's a devil so evil that she deserves to be eliminated.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Whether she's truly a devil, and even if she is, whether she's a devil so evil that she deserves to be eliminated.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Whether she's truly a devil, and even if she is, whether she's a devil so evil that she deserves to be eliminated.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Not knowing whether devils are evil... Hardly something I'd expect to hear from an exorcist.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Not knowing whether devils are evil... Hardly something I'd expect to hear from an exorcist.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Not knowing whether devils are evil... Hardly something I'd expect to hear from an exorcist.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If Momo really is a devil... what would the Administration do?
root.m_Talk_DEU: If Momo really is a devil... what would the Administration do?
root.m_Talk_FRA: If Momo really is a devil... what would the Administration do?

root.m_Talk_ENG: The Administration doesn't judge enemies based on whether they're devils, but on whether they pose a threat to the city.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The Administration doesn't judge enemies based on whether they're devils, but on whether they pose a threat to the city.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The Administration doesn't judge enemies based on whether they're devils, but on whether they pose a threat to the city.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Whether it's an ordinary civilian, a criminal Counter, or a devil, if they cause trouble in my jurisdiction, we respond according to Administration regulations.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Whether it's an ordinary civilian, a criminal Counter, or a devil, if they cause trouble in my jurisdiction, we respond according to Administration regulations.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Whether it's an ordinary civilian, a criminal Counter, or a devil, if they cause trouble in my jurisdiction, we respond according to Administration regulations.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I don't know how dangerous the kind of devil you're talking about is, but the intruders have already hurt people in Ground One.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I don't know how dangerous the kind of devil you're talking about is, but the intruders have already hurt people in Ground One.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I don't know how dangerous the kind of devil you're talking about is, but the intruders have already hurt people in Ground One.

root.m_Talk_ENG: On top of that, we've detected signs they were securing internal city maps and trying to disable security systems.
root.m_Talk_DEU: On top of that, we've detected signs they were securing internal city maps and trying to disable security systems.
root.m_Talk_FRA: On top of that, we've detected signs they were securing internal city maps and trying to disable security systems.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's the kind of threat we're trying to stop.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's the kind of threat we're trying to stop.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's the kind of threat we're trying to stop.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If you want to be involved in this matter, you'll follow the Administration's instructions from here on out.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If you want to be involved in this matter, you'll follow the Administration's instructions from here on out.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If you want to be involved in this matter, you'll follow the Administration's instructions from here on out.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Any personal actions that interfere with our work will be treated as violations. Be careful.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Any personal actions that interfere with our work will be treated as violations. Be careful.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Any personal actions that interfere with our work will be treated as violations. Be careful.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If you need help, I want to help.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If you need help, I want to help.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If you need help, I want to help.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But there's something even more important to me than that...
root.m_Talk_DEU: But there's something even more important to me than that...
root.m_Talk_FRA: But there's something even more important to me than that...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Don't worry. While you're cooperating, we'll ensure the safety of Momo.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Don't worry. While you're cooperating, we'll ensure the safety of Momo.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Don't worry. While you're cooperating, we'll ensure the safety of Momo.

root.m_Talk_ENG: She'll be in a far safer place than an exposed bar like that.
root.m_Talk_DEU: She'll be in a far safer place than an exposed bar like that.
root.m_Talk_FRA: She'll be in a far safer place than an exposed bar like that.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ooh... So this is my new hideout!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ooh... So this is my new hideout!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ooh... So this is my new hideout!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Momo, will you be all right on your own for a while?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Momo, will you be all right on your own for a while?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Momo, will you be all right on your own for a while?

root.m_Talk_ENG: What do you take a Demon Lord for? I'll be fine! Go on already, Nicole!
root.m_Talk_DEU: What do you take a Demon Lord for? I'll be fine! Go on already, Nicole!
root.m_Talk_FRA: What do you take a Demon Lord for? I'll be fine! Go on already, Nicole!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ah... Sure.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ah... Sure.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ah... Sure.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What, feeling a little disappointed now that the kid isn't clinging to you and begging you not to go?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What, feeling a little disappointed now that the kid isn't clinging to you and begging you not to go?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What, feeling a little disappointed now that the kid isn't clinging to you and begging you not to go?

root.m_Talk_ENG: N-no, that's not it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: N-no, that's not it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: N-no, that's not it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I thought she'd hate staying in an unfamiliar place, so it's a surprise she likes it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I thought she'd hate staying in an unfamiliar place, so it's a surprise she likes it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I thought she'd hate staying in an unfamiliar place, so it's a surprise she likes it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's because I prepared a special lure.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's because I prepared a special lure.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's because I prepared a special lure.

root.m_Talk_ENG: No kid is going to say they want to go home when there's a five-tier dessert cart piled high with snacks right in front of them.
root.m_Talk_DEU: No kid is going to say they want to go home when there's a five-tier dessert cart piled high with snacks right in front of them.
root.m_Talk_FRA: No kid is going to say they want to go home when there's a five-tier dessert cart piled high with snacks right in front of them.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Blegh! Ginseng jelly is gross!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Blegh! Ginseng jelly is gross!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Blegh! Ginseng jelly is gross!

root.m_Talk_ENG: What?! But that's the best one...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: What?! But that's the best one...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: What?! But that's the best one...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ahem, anyway. It's not like you're vanishing without warning. If you stuff her with good food and sleep here a few nights, and come to get her after, why would she refuse?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ahem, anyway. It's not like you're vanishing without warning. If you stuff her with good food and sleep here a few nights, and come to get her after, why would she refuse?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ahem, anyway. It's not like you're vanishing without warning. If you stuff her with good food and sleep here a few nights, and come to get her after, why would she refuse?

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...You're right. I guess I was worrying over nothing.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...You're right. I guess I was worrying over nothing.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...You're right. I guess I was worrying over nothing.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Let's go, Minha.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Let's go, Minha.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Let's go, Minha.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Mm?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Mm?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Mm?

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Nicole.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Nicole.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Nicole.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Momo?
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Momo?
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Momo?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Whatever you're doing, come back safely.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Whatever you're doing, come back safely.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Whatever you're doing, come back safely.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'll wait bravely too.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'll wait bravely too.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'll wait bravely too.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It was a strange feeling.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It was a strange feeling.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It was a strange feeling.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I always thought of her as a helpless kid I had to protect.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I always thought of her as a helpless kid I had to protect.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I always thought of her as a helpless kid I had to protect.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But she can make such a reassuring expression, too...
root.m_Talk_DEU: But she can make such a reassuring expression, too...
root.m_Talk_FRA: But she can make such a reassuring expression, too...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So wait without worry, Demon Lord.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So wait without worry, Demon Lord.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So wait without worry, Demon Lord.

root.m_Talk_ENG: By the way, that kid...
root.m_Talk_DEU: By the way, that kid...
root.m_Talk_FRA: By the way, that kid...

root.m_Talk_ENG: She called herself a Demon Lord, right?
root.m_Talk_DEU: She called herself a Demon Lord, right?
root.m_Talk_FRA: She called herself a Demon Lord, right?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm one of that Demon Lord's four champions. It's like role-playing.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm one of that Demon Lord's four champions. It's like role-playing.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm one of that Demon Lord's four champions. It's like role-playing.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Do you know where she came from?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Do you know where she came from?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Do you know where she came from?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Our boss, who's away on a trip right now, brought her.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Our boss, who's away on a trip right now, brought her.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Our boss, who's away on a trip right now, brought her.

root.m_Talk_ENG: From where?
root.m_Talk_DEU: From where?
root.m_Talk_FRA: From where?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm not sure. I never asked that far.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm not sure. I never asked that far.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm not sure. I never asked that far.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The Senior told me to cooperate, but I don't really like working with others.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The Senior told me to cooperate, but I don't really like working with others.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The Senior told me to cooperate, but I don't really like working with others.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So you can just go back to the bar.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So you can just go back to the bar.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So you can just go back to the bar.

root.m_Talk_ENG:
What? Did I say something wrong? Why all of a sudden
8g
root.m_Talk_DEU:
What? Did I say something wrong? Why all of a sudden
8g
root.m_Talk_FRA:
What? Did I say something wrong? Why all of a sudden
8g

root.m_Talk_ENG: This isn't a case an ordinary person can handle.
root.m_Talk_DEU: This isn't a case an ordinary person can handle.
root.m_Talk_FRA: This isn't a case an ordinary person can handle.

root.m_Talk_ENG: No matter who the Senior is, they can't just casually drag an unrelated civilian into something that risks their life.
root.m_Talk_DEU: No matter who the Senior is, they can't just casually drag an unrelated civilian into something that risks their life.
root.m_Talk_FRA: No matter who the Senior is, they can't just casually drag an unrelated civilian into something that risks their life.

root.m_Talk_ENG: This isn't someone else's problem. Momo was targeted by those intruders!
root.m_Talk_DEU: This isn't someone else's problem. Momo was targeted by those intruders!
root.m_Talk_FRA: This isn't someone else's problem. Momo was targeted by those intruders!

root.m_Talk_ENG: That means I have a responsibility to uncover the truth, too.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That means I have a responsibility to uncover the truth, too.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That means I have a responsibility to uncover the truth, too.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That kid likes you. She follows you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That kid likes you. She follows you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That kid likes you. She follows you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I don't want to be the one to tell her the person she cares about is dead.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I don't want to be the one to tell her the person she cares about is dead.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I don't want to be the one to tell her the person she cares about is dead.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Why... would you say something so ominous?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Why... would you say something so ominous?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Why... would you say something so ominous?

root.m_Talk_ENG: The intruders in Ground One are far more dangerous than you imagine.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The intruders in Ground One are far more dangerous than you imagine.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The intruders in Ground One are far more dangerous than you imagine.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Two years ago, everyone who tried to dig into what was behind them died. That included a Grade S Counter.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Two years ago, everyone who tried to dig into what was behind them died. That included a Grade S Counter.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Two years ago, everyone who tried to dig into what was behind them died. That included a Grade S Counter.

root.m_Talk_ENG: A Grade S Counter was taken out?
root.m_Talk_DEU: A Grade S Counter was taken out?
root.m_Talk_FRA: A Grade S Counter was taken out?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then the one behind it all... That Demon Lord you mentioned before?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then the one behind it all... That Demon Lord you mentioned before?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then the one behind it all... That Demon Lord you mentioned before?

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's right. The Demon Lord Beelzebub.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's right. The Demon Lord Beelzebub.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's right. The Demon Lord Beelzebub.

root.m_Talk_ENG: A monster that could wipe out not just a Grade S Counter, but an entire world. And his followers, people who worship something like that as a god, set foot in Ground One with their own schemes.
root.m_Talk_DEU: A monster that could wipe out not just a Grade S Counter, but an entire world. And his followers, people who worship something like that as a god, set foot in Ground One with their own schemes.
root.m_Talk_FRA: A monster that could wipe out not just a Grade S Counter, but an entire world. And his followers, people who worship something like that as a god, set foot in Ground One with their own schemes.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So step away.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So step away.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So step away.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Leave it to the Administration from here on out, hide quietly, and return to your normal life.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Leave it to the Administration from here on out, hide quietly, and return to your normal life.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Leave it to the Administration from here on out, hide quietly, and return to your normal life.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If even a Grade S Counter fell, then you're risking your life too, aren't you?
root.m_Talk_DEU: If even a Grade S Counter fell, then you're risking your life too, aren't you?
root.m_Talk_FRA: If even a Grade S Counter fell, then you're risking your life too, aren't you?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm prepared for that. That's where you and I differ.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm prepared for that. That's where you and I differ.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm prepared for that. That's where you and I differ.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Can you say you'd be fine with dying, leaving that kid behind?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Can you say you'd be fine with dying, leaving that kid behind?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Can you say you'd be fine with dying, leaving that kid behind?

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: This is an emergency broadcast on the priority channel.
root.m_Talk_DEU: This is an emergency broadcast on the priority channel.
root.m_Talk_FRA: This is an emergency broadcast on the priority channel.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Approximately three minutes ago, the Police Agency received eight reports of hostiles. All eight locations are showing Corruption ray readings.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Approximately three minutes ago, the Police Agency received eight reports of hostiles. All eight locations are showing Corruption ray readings.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Approximately three minutes ago, the Police Agency received eight reports of hostiles. All eight locations are showing Corruption ray readings.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Rapid response units are en route to the initial observation points. To minimize damage to the city, all available Administration forces capable of reaching the transmitted coordinates are requested to provide immediate support.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Rapid response units are en route to the initial observation points. To minimize damage to the city, all available Administration forces capable of reaching the transmitted coordinates are requested to provide immediate support.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Rapid response units are en route to the initial observation points. To minimize damage to the city, all available Administration forces capable of reaching the transmitted coordinates are requested to provide immediate support.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I repeat...
root.m_Talk_DEU: I repeat...
root.m_Talk_FRA: I repeat...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Everyone has their own reason to live.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Everyone has their own reason to live.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Everyone has their own reason to live.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Digging into those Demon Lord cultists, finding and smacking the Demon Lord down... is my reason.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Digging into those Demon Lord cultists, finding and smacking the Demon Lord down... is my reason.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Digging into those Demon Lord cultists, finding and smacking the Demon Lord down... is my reason.

root.m_Talk_ENG: My reason for living.
root.m_Talk_DEU: My reason for living.
root.m_Talk_FRA: My reason for living.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Is this girl... alive?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Is this girl... alive?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Is this girl... alive?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. When we arrived, she was the village's sole survivor.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. When we arrived, she was the village's sole survivor.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. When we arrived, she was the village's sole survivor.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Unbelievable. After that many C.O.s swept through the area... someone made it out alive?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Unbelievable. After that many C.O.s swept through the area... someone made it out alive?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Unbelievable. After that many C.O.s swept through the area... someone made it out alive?

root.m_Talk_ENG: As you say, it can only be called a miracle.
root.m_Talk_DEU: As you say, it can only be called a miracle.
root.m_Talk_FRA: As you say, it can only be called a miracle.

root.m_Talk_ENG: There must be a reason the child survived...
root.m_Talk_DEU: There must be a reason the child survived...
root.m_Talk_FRA: There must be a reason the child survived...

root.m_Talk_ENG: And uncovering that reason will be the mission the Holy Curia bears.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And uncovering that reason will be the mission the Holy Curia bears.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And uncovering that reason will be the mission the Holy Curia bears.
